should_trigger: I got review comments on my PR, help me address them
Here's a PR with feedback: https://github.com/myorg/myproject/pull/123 — respond to comments
The reviewer flagged an N+1 query, how should I fix it?
Draft responses to these review comments and fix the code
Check if the reviewer's suggestions follow our iron laws
should_not_trigger: Review my new auth module for security issues — belongs to /phx:review
Challenge my LiveView component approach — belongs to /phx:challenge
Triage and categorize these review findings — belongs to /phx:triage
Debug this timeout in my test suite — belongs to /phx:investigate
Show me LiveView patterns for streams — belongs to /phx:liveview-patterns
